title: Add riscv64 support for cross compilation
body:
~~- add riscv64 linux static release build~~
~~- update the release-artifacts with riscv64~~
~~- bump containers/ocicrypt to v1.1.8~~
- adding a cross-compilation option for riscv64
- extending GetFcosArch with the riscv64 architecture parameter

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: Also I think you need to run make vendor to fix your vendoring issues.

Thanks, it makes sense. I have limited the changes in this Pull Request to the following:
- adding a cross-compilation option for riscv64
- extending GetFcosArch with the riscv64 architecture parameter
You need to add [NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] to your github message and repush.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons
